question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/repository/EntityRepository.java -> Scope: Medium: Increasing network processing node resource consumption by at least 30% without brute force actions, compared to the preceding 24 hours'] [Function: getSupply()] Can an unprivileged external user repeatedly call the public /api/v1/network/supply endpoint to trigger the unbounded aggregation query (sum(e.balance), max(e.balance_timestamp)) over the entire entity table with no result caching in EntityRepository, causing sustained DB CPU and I/O consumption exceeding 30% above baseline?
